title: Illusioner Return!
description: Returns Illusioner Mob as a spawnable mob in world! (this mob can be spawned only with coomand without this mod!) New biome: Illusion Biome, New Items like: Illuzuz Sword, Illuzuz Pickaxe and the Illusion Artefact (thing that you will really need to get!)
body:
Returns Illusioner Mob as a spawnable mob in world! (this mob can be spawned only with command without this mod!) New biome: Illusion Biome, New Items like: Illuzuz Sword, Illuzuz Pickaxe and the Illusion Artefact (thing that you will really need to get!), New structures: Illusioner House/Camp, Illusion Crate and MoonLight Stand, New ore: Illuzuz! New Blocks: Illusion block (and other types of this block) and Real Block Illusion! Much more in the future updates!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You can get some testing items in creative!

</details>
